h1.visual_description: Centered, serif font, large size, sentence case, typically ending with a period.

h2.visual_description: Centered, serif font, identical in style to h1 but used for secondary topical divisions on the page.
h2.example_text: Earth and Moon, Drawn to Scale.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Bolded prefix indicating the start of a figure caption.
Interactive hyperlink for cross-referencing figures or external links.
Source attribution for images, usually placed at the end of a caption.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom footer containing page number and chapter/section metadata (e.g., '10 | Chapter 1 Section 1.6: A Tour of the Universe').
